definitions: A period of time when employees of a company go away together to a place that is not their usual workplace, often to discuss business strategies, build teamwork, or for recreational purposes.
An event or series of events organized by a company for its employees, typically held off-site, to foster team building, strategic planning, or employee well-being.
examples: The annual company retreat was held in the mountains.
They used the company retreat to brainstorm new product ideas.
Attendance at the company retreat is mandatory for all managers.
